english_query: During a night patrol on the Whispering Ridge, the ranger squad discovers a clearing where an ancient forest spirit has placed two wooden chests on a stone altar.
ugf_response: First, we see that the night walk on a high hill brings the group of people to a clear area where an old forest thing has put two wood boxes on a rock table. What is at chance of bad thing is that the boxes could hold either a bad thing that can hurt the group or a good thing that can help them on their walk. The best answer many would pick is to open the boxes slowly, look inside, and take any good thing while staying ready to run if a bad thing shows. But a good cause to think a different way is that the old forest thing might have set a bad hidden thing, so touching the boxes could bring a hidden bad thing that hurts the group. We think about the chance of bad thing of a hidden bad thing against the hope of a good thing, and we see that the safe way is to leave the boxes alone until we can learn more about the old forest thing. So we decide to not open the boxes now and keep moving, staying safe. We should not open the boxes now and keep moving, staying safe.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Sometimes many people believe that a thing is true. You might think that if a lot of people say it, it must be the right way to see the world. This is not always the case. We must be careful not to believe things just because many people say so.

To understand why, we must look at how people think. People often look at what others are doing to decide what they should do or believe. If a large group of people acts a certain way, a person might think, they must know something I do not know. This is a way to stay safe and fit in with the group. However, this way of thinking can lead to being wrong.

First, we must see that groups can be wrong. In the past, many people believed the world was flat. They believed it because everyone they knew believed it. But the world was not flat. The many people were wrong. The number of people who believe a thing does not make that thing true. Truth does not come from how many people say it. Truth comes from what is real in the world.

Second, we must see how groups can change. People can become afraid or angry. When people feel these things, they might all start to believe the same wrong thing at the same time. They might follow a leader who says things that are not true. Because they are all acting together, they do not stop to think for themselves. They stop asking if the thing they believe is actually real.

Third, we must see that being part of a group can stop us from seeing the truth. If you want to be liked by your friends, you might not say when you think they are wrong. You might even start to believe the wrong thing just so you can stay with them. This means that even if the truth is right in front of you, you might not see it because you are too busy trying to be like everyone else.

So, how should we find what is true? We should not look at how many people believe a thing. Instead, we should look at the things that can be seen and felt. We should look for things that can be shown to be real. We must use our own minds to look at what is happening. We should ask if the thing is real, not if the group says it is real. To find the truth, we must be willing to stand alone if that is what the truth asks of us.

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package does not arrive today. Therefore, the package arrives tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things is true. Either the box comes today or the box comes tomorrow. It says we must pick one. Next, we look at the second idea. It says the box does not come today. This means the first part is not true. Since the first idea says one must be true, and the first one is not, the other one must be true. So the box must come tomorrow. We can think of a small story to check this. Imagine a person says they will wear a red hat or a blue hat. Then they say they are not wearing the red hat. If we believe the first part, they must be wearing the blue hat. If they were not wearing the blue hat, the first part would be wrong. But we take the first part as right. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: Also, the mind when it is working is the thing being known, just as the sense when it is working is the thing being sensed. This happens because the sense gets the look of the thing seen, and the mind gets the look of the thing understood. So if god is seen by the made mind when it is working, he must be seen by some look.
ugf_response: What god is is being itself. So just as other things known that are not being itself join to the mind by some thing that makes the mind know and work; so what god is joins to the made mind, as the thing actually known, making the mind work by and of itself.

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
First, we look at the hard job of making choices. Sometimes we must pick between two things that are both good or both bad. This can be very hard. To help with this, some people make their own set of ways to think. They build a way to help them know what to do when they are not sure. This way to think helps them know what to do. The hard question here is how to make this way to think so it works well for every hard choice. We want the way to think to be just and right, but also easy to use.

Some people say we should look at the end of the choice. They think we should pick the thing that brings the most good to the most people. They believe that if the thing that happens is good, then the choice was good. This way of thinking looks at what happens after we act. It asks us to count the good and the bad parts of what might happen.

Other people say we should follow certain steps no matter what. They think some things are just wrong to do, even if doing them would bring good things. For them, the act itself is what matters. They have a set of things we should never do. They believe that being right is more important than getting a good thing to happen. This way of thinking looks at the act, not just the end.

Still other people say we should look at who we are. They think we should try to be a good person. They ask what a kind or strong person would do. They build their way to think on the kind of person they want to be. This way of thinking looks at the heart and mind of the person making the choice.

Each way has its own good points and its own hard parts. The way that looks at what happens can be hard because we cannot always know what will happen. The way that follows steps can be hard because sometimes the steps lead to bad things. The way that looks at who we are can be hard because people do not always agree on what a good person is.

So, when we build our own set of ways to think, we must think about these different ideas. We might put them together. We might say that some steps are always right, but we also look at what happens. We might also think about being a good person. The thing we want to reach is a way to think that helps us make choices we can stand by. We want to feel good about our choices even when they are hard. This is a long work, but it helps us live a better life.

english_query: why saying something over and over does not make it true
ugf_response:
We see a group of people hear a short set of words that is said many times. One person may say a short set of words and then say it again and again, and the other people hear it over and over. The scene is simple: a voice says a short set of words about something, the same short set of words is spoken many times, and many ears hear it. The hard thing to think about is why the fact that a short set of words is spoken many times does not make the words true.

First, we look at what is happening. A short set of words is a piece of talk that says something about the world. The words are repeated, so the ears get used to hearing the same sounds. The more the words are heard, the more they may feel familiar, and the more the mind may think it is safe or good to accept. This feeling comes from the way the mind works, not from the words themselves. The mind can think that something that feels familiar is more maybe right, even when the words have no thing that shows they are right or a thing that shows they do not fit with what we see.

Now we see the hard thing to think about. The question is: does hearing a short set of words many times change the words themselves? The answer is no. A short set of words is about what is or is not. The number of times it is said does not add any new thing that shows it is right or any new reason that makes the words line up with what we can see or look at. The words stay the same whether they are said once or 1000 times. The only thing that changes is how people feel about them.

People give other answers because they think about why the mind may act this way. Some say that when a short set of words is said many times, it becomes part of what we think of as normal, and we may stop looking for a thing that shows it is right. Others say that saying the words many times can make people remember them, and memory can be good for when we need to talk about something that we already know is right. Still other people say that the only real way to know if the words are right is to look at the world, to see if they fit with what we see. They say that saying the words many times does not add any new look at the world, so it does not make the words right.

Why do these other answers happen? One reason is that people feel a sense of not being hurt when they hear the same sounds many times. That feeling can make them think the words are right, even if they have not looked at a thing that shows they fit with the world. Another reason is that people may have seen the words work in one case and then think that because they were said many times, they must work in all cases. This is not right, because one case does not tell us about all cases. A third reason is that some people think that if many people say the same thing, then it must be right. The number of people who say it is not the same as a thing that shows it is right; it is just many voices.

In the end, the clear point is that the act of saying a short set of words again and again does not add any new thing that shows they are right or any new look at the world. It only adds more hearing of the same sounds. To know if the words are right, we must look at the world, see if they fit, and check them with what we see. Saying the words many times can make them feel familiar, but it does not make the words right. This is the hard thing to think about, and it is why many people still talk about it.

english_query: what it means to live a good life by being a good person
ugf_response:
The first thing the person says is that a good life comes from being a good person. This is the part they say is true. They are saying that if you do things that are right and good, your life will have a good way of being.

The second thing is what they think follows from that first thing. They think that if you act in a way that is good, then the state of your life will be good. They see a path between how you act and how your life feels or how it is seen by others.

The third thing is to look at if the way they think is good. This is to see if the first thing leads to the second thing in a way that makes sense. One might ask if a person can be good but still have a life that is not good. One might also ask if a person can have a life that is good but not be a good person. Because of this, the way they think may not be as strong as it looks. It is not clear if being good is the only thing that makes a life good.

And for this reason there cannot be anything better than these; just as there cannot be anything better than god.

Then we think about each part and see that each one can lead to a state that is not good. Next, we look for a way that stays away from the most not good parts of both ways. This new way often sits in the place that is not the first not good way and not the other not good way. When you choose this place you get not as much hurt as if you choose any of the two not good ways. This makes it easy to see the why that the good way is most of the time in the place that is not the first not good way and not the other not good way.

english_query: Also, as said before, what god really is is just being. But being seems very not good, because it is found in everything and can take on any change. So god is not good.
ugf_response: Being is the most good of all things, because it is what makes things real; for nothing is real unless it is. So being makes all things real, even their shapes. So being is not like the thing that gets filled, but like the thing that fills. So when I talk about the being of a man, or a horse, or anything else, being is seen as what gives the shape, and as something taken in; and not as the thing that is.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response:
Sometimes, the way you think about a thing can stop you from seeing more about that thing. This happens when you have a set way of looking at the world. You build a house of thoughts in your mind. Each thought sits on top of the one before it. This house looks strong and good to you. You feel that you know the truth. But because you are inside this house, you can only see what the windows allow you to see. You do not see the trees outside or the sky above. You only see the walls you made.

First, you start with a thought that you believe is true. This thought is like a ground for all your other thoughts. You use this ground to build more thoughts. Each new thought must fit with the first one. If a new thought does not fit, you throw it away. You tell yourself that the new thought is wrong. You do not stop to think that your first thought might be wrong. You only look for things that make your house feel safe.

Second, this way of thinking makes you stop looking for new ways to see. When you think you already know the way, your mind stops working hard. It is like a man who thinks he knows the way home, so he stops looking at the signs on the road. He walks in the wrong way because he does not want to change his mind. His own thought tells him he is right, so he stops asking if he is right.

Third, this can lead to a bad place. If your first thought was not the whole truth, then every thought you build on top of it will also be not the whole truth. You are building a very tall thing on a ground that is not flat. The thing might look good for a while, but it is not real. You think you are learning more, but you are only learning more about the things you got wrong. You are not seeing the world as it is. You are only seeing the world as your first thought says it must be. To stop this, you must be willing to break your house and start again on new ground.

The old church teacher says it is wrong to say only seen things are true, because then hidden rocks would not be real rocks. english_query: the question of whether animals feeling pain matters as much as people
ugf_response:
Person number one: Do you think that when an animal feels hurt it is the same as when a human feels hurt?

Person number two: I think it is very close, but it is hard to say for sure. We know that when we get hurt, our bodies tell us it is bad. We see that animals also act as if they are in pain. They cry out or try to move away from the thing that hurts them.

Person number one: But is the feeling inside their heads the same as what we feel?

Person number two: We cannot go inside their heads to see. We can only look at what they do. Some people say that because humans can think about the future and talk about what they feel, the hurt that a human feels is more important. They say we can feel sad about being hurt for a long time.

Person number one: So you are saying that the hurt of a human is more important because they can think more?

Person number two: That is one way to look at it. Other people say that any living thing that can feel hurt should be given care. They say that if a thing can feel bad, we should not make it feel bad. To them, the way the thing thinks does not change the fact that it feels pain.

Person number one: If we cannot know what they feel, how can we make a choice about what is right?

Person number two: We have to look at the things we see. We see that animals have bodies like ours and they act like they are in pain. Because of this, many people say we must act as if their hurt matters just as much as ours. It is a way to be kind to all living things.

ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea, which says that turning on the light makes the room bright. This tells us what happens when the light goes on, but it does not say what happens when the light stays off. The second idea tells us he does not turn on the light. The last idea says the room is not bright. But the room could be bright for other reasons, like the sun giving light through a window. Since the first idea does not say the light is the only way to make the room bright, we cannot be sure the room is dark just because the light is off. So the last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: why being good at being a person is like being good at anything else
ugf_response:
To be good at being a person means you know how to act well with other people and how to take care of yourself. Some people think this is something you are born with. They think you either have it or you do not. But being good at being a person is just like being good at playing a game or being good at making things with your hands.

First, we must look at how we learn things. When you want to be good at a game, you must look at how the game works. You must see what happens when you do one thing and what happens when you do another thing. You must watch the people who are already good at the game. You see what they do and you try to do the same. Being a person is the same. You watch how people talk. You watch how they show they are happy or sad. You see what makes people feel good and what makes them feel bad.

Second, you must do the same thing many times to get better. If you want to be good at a game, you cannot just watch it once and say you are the best. You must play it many, many times. At first, you will do things that are wrong. This is okay. You learn from the things that went wrong. When you are a person, you will say things that make people mad. You will make choices that make you feel bad. But you learn from these things. Each time you do something that is not right, you learn how to do better the next time.

Third, you must have a way to know if you are doing well. In a game, there is a way to see if you won or lost. In being a person, the way you know if you are doing well is by looking at the people around you and how you feel inside. If people want to be near you and if you feel a deep sense of being okay with yourself, it means you are doing well.

Finally, being good at being a person takes time. It does not happen in one day. It is a long road of learning and doing and doing things that are not right. Just like any other thing you want to be good at, you get better if you keep trying and keep watching and keep learning.

english_query: Either the runner finished first or the runner finished second. The runner did not finish first. Therefore, the runner finished second. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must be true. The first thing is that the runner finished in the top spot. The second thing is that the runner finished in the spot right after that. These are the only two choices given. Then, we look at the next idea. It tells us that the first choice is not true. The runner did not finish in the top spot. Since the first idea said one of the two choices had to be true, and we now know the first one is not true, the other one must be the true one. So, if the runner did not finish first, and they had to finish either first or second, then they must have finished second. I can think of a small story to check this. Imagine a game with only two people. If one person is not first, they must be second. There is no other place for them to be. So the last idea follows for sure from the first two ideas. follows

ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks they know things. A person might think they have a true and full picture of how the world works. This person might think their thoughts are the same as what is real. This is a problem because the person is not seeing the things they do not know. Second, we see that the person does not know what they do not know. This means there are many things that are true that the person has not seen. Third, when a person thinks they know everything, they stop looking for new things. They stop asking questions. This makes their mind stay small and not strong. The thing after the third thing, when a person makes a choice resting on a thought that is not true, they might hurt themselves or hurt others. The thing after that, the way to fix this is to always think that we might be wrong. We must always look for the things we have missed. This keeps our minds open and helps us find the truth.

english_query: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them
ugf_response: First, we must think about how we act toward the people around us. We do not act the same way toward every person we see. For some people, we give much of our time and our things. For other people, we give very little. We must ask why this is so. We see that the way we act rests on how we feel about the person. This feeling is the way we see that person in our own hearts and minds. If we see a person as someone we love, like a mother or a child, we feel a strong need to help them. This feeling makes us want to do things for them that we would not do for a person we do not know. The way we see them changes the way we choose to act. Second, we can see that the things we do for people are not just about the things themselves. They are about the way two people are joined together. If the way they are joined is strong, the things we do are more important. If the way they are joined is not strong, the things we do are less important. This means that the person is not just a thing in the world, but a person who has a place in our life. Third, we see that what we do tells us who we are and who they are to us. If we help someone because they are a friend, we are showing that we are a friend. If we help someone because they are a stranger, we are showing that we are a kind person to everyone. So, the person you are to me changes what I should do for you because the way we are joined tells me how much weight to give to your needs. The person you are to me changes the way I think about what is right to do.

Next, we think about people who are not here now or people who will be born long after we are gone. We must ask if our things and our ways of living can hurt or help these people. This means we have a thing we must do to care for people even if we will never see their faces or hear their voices. We must think about how our acts today will make the world for those who come after us. Finally, we see that being good is not just about the people we know, but about the whole line of people that will live in the world.

english_query: "Imagine the garden as a shared field of stalks..."
ugf_response: First, we look at the words used. A garden is a place where we grow food. A shared field means many people use it. The tall parts of the green things are like sticks standing up. So the picture is of many people growing food together in one open space. We think about why this matters. When people share a place to grow food, they must work together. They need to agree on who puts the small hard bits in the dirt and who gets to eat the food. This is about how we live with others. Some might say sharing is hard because people want more for themselves. They might fight over the best spots or the best food. This is a strong point to think about. But we also see that if people do not share, they might have less food or no friends. Working together can make the garden bigger and better for everyone. The big idea is that we are not alone. We need each other to make things grow. The view that is different is that being alone is safer. But in a garden, being alone means less help and less happy feeling. So the best way is to think of the garden as a place for us all. It shows that our lives are tied together like the green things in the ground. The garden as a shared field of tall green sticks shows that we grow best when we work together and care for each other.

english_query: It looks like being good does not have the end part, but has other parts. Because people talk that being good is talked about as being nice to see. But being nice to see has the part of what something is. So being good has the part of what something is.
ugf_response: Being nice to see and being good are the same kind of thing, because both come from the same what something is. That is why people talk about being good as being nice to see. But they work in different ways. Being good is about want, and want is a kind of end, so being good has the end part. Being nice to see is about the eye, because nice to see things make the eye happy when they are in a right size. The eye is a kind of mind, like all mind. Since what is known comes from seeing, and being like is about what something is, being nice to see belongs to the what something is part.

Now spirits from god do not have picture seeing or sense seeing, but only mind seeing. So spirits from god cannot know things made of stuff.
ugf_response: Sense does not catch what things are, but only how they look on the outside. In the same way, picture seeing does not; for it catches only the look of bodies. Only the mind catches what things are. So it is said that the mind looks at what a thing is, and it does not go wrong about this; just as sense does not go wrong about what it senses. So what things made of stuff are is in the mind of men and spirits from god, as the thing known is in the one who knows, and not by their real way of being. But some things are in the mind or soul by both ways; and in either case there is mind seeing.

english_query: when helping the group costs you but helps everyone
ugf_response: First, we must look at what it means when a person gives something of themselves to help a whole group of people. Second, we see that this person must lose something, such as time, money, or work, to make the group better. Third, we see that every person in the group gets something good from this act. The step after the third step shows that we must think about why a person would do this if it makes their own life harder. The step after that shows that if everyone thinks only of themselves, the group will not have much power and no one will get the good things that come from working together. The step after the one after that shows that if people act for the good of the whole, the group becomes strong and even the person who gave something may find that they are better off in the end because the group is now a better place to live. The step after the one after the one after that shows that this is a hard choice because the person feels the thing that is gone right now, but the good for the group might take a long time to come. The step after the one after the one after the one after that shows that we must find a way to make people want to help even when it hurts them, perhaps by making sure the group takes care of the person who helps.

english_query: Free-riding is individually rational but collectively disastrous. Recognizing the dominant strategy to contribute nothing is correct game theory — but treating it as the final answer ignores the mechanisms (punishment, reputation, norms) that sustain cooperation in real communities.
ugf_response: First, we see that each person in a group can choose to give or not give. If a person does not give, they still get the good that the group makes, so not giving looks like the best own idea. Second, if everyone thinks this way, the group will get little or no good, which is a bad end for the whole group. Next, real groups do not end up like that because they have ways that make people give, such as hurt those who do not give, let others see who gave, and have shared ideas about what is right. Next, these ways work because they change what each person gets if they do not give, making giving look better for them. Another, some might say that these ways are not always there, or that hurting people is not just, so the simple idea of not giving could still be the answer. Also, even if those ways are small, many groups still find ways to keep people giving, so the simple idea is not the whole story. Not giving looks like the best own idea for one person, but real groups use ways like hurt, being seen, and shared ideas to keep people giving, so we should not stop at the simple idea.

english_query: how to tell if one thing follows from another
ugf_response: You did not give me the words you want me to look at. Please give me the words. Once you give me the words, I will tell you what the person says is true. I will also tell you what they think comes after those things. Last, I will tell you if the way they think is good or bad. I will use only the simple words you told me I can use. I will not use any marks to make the words look different. I will write in long pieces of writing that move like a story.

english_query: why everyone doing what is best for them can make things worse for all
ugf_response: First, we think about a group of people who all want to get the most good for themselves. Each person looks at what they can do to make their own life better or get more things. Second, we see that when each person makes this choice, they are only looking at their own needs and not the needs of the whole group. Third, we look at what happens when many people do this at the same time. If every person takes more than they need or uses things in a way that only helps them, the things that everyone needs might run out. The step after the third step shows that when many people do this, the whole lot of good for the whole group goes down even though each person tried to get more. The step after that shows that this happens because the choices of one person change the world for everyone else in a bad way. Finally, we see that when everyone acts only for themselves, the end state is a place where everyone is worse off than they would be if they worked together.

english_query: The young friend will not be mad, for he is very kind. But tell me old teacher, please, is this, after all, not the true thing?
ugf_response: You old number man, you like new ideas, and now you think that I have a bag full of them, and can easily pull one out to beat the last one. But you do not see that in truth none of these ideas come from me; they all come from the one who talks with me. I only know just enough to pull them from the able to think well thoughts of another, and to take them in a right way. And now I will say nothing myself, but will try to get something from our young friend.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen
ugf_response:
Sometimes we want to know if something will happen in the future. We do not know for sure because we cannot see the future. However, we can look at what we know right now to make a good guess. This is not a guess made without any thought. It is a way to see how much chance there is that a thing is true.

First, we look at what has happened before. If a thing has happened many times in the same way, we think it will happen again. To show this, if the sun comes up every morning, we have a very strong reason to think it will come up tomorrow. This is because we have seen it happen so many times.

Second, we look at how things work right now. We look at the things around us. We see how one thing makes another thing move or change. If we see a heavy stone falling, we can use what we know about how heavy things move to guess where that stone will be in a short time. We use what we see to build a picture in our heads of what will happen next.

Third, we must think about how much we know. If we have many pieces of information that all say the same thing, our guess becomes stronger. If we have only one piece of information, our guess has little power. If we have information that says two different things, we must be careful. We must ask if one piece of information is better than the other.

When we put all these things together, we can say that we have a good reason to believe something. We are not saying we are certain. We are saying that, resting on what we have seen and how things work, there is a big chance that the thing will happen. Or, if the things we see point in the other way, we have a good reason to think it will not happen. This way of thinking helps us make choices even when we do not know everything.

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to find the very best answer to a problem. To find the very best answer, a person must spend a lot of time looking at every possible thing that could be true. This takes much time and much work. Second, we must think about what we must give up to do this work. The time and the work used to find the best answer are things that we must pay for with our life and our time. If finding the best answer takes too long, we might run out of time to do other things that are important. Third, we look at an answer that is good enough. This is an answer that is not the best, but it is good enough to help us move forward or to stop a bad thing from happening. The thing after the third step is that we see a good enough answer can be found much faster than the best answer. Because it is fast, we save a lot of time and we do not use as much work. The thing after that is that we see the choice we must make. If the time we save by using a good enough answer is more important than the small bit of how good the answer is that we lose by not having the best answer, then the good enough answer is the better choice. This means that in many cases, being fast and being good enough is better than being slow and being the very best.

english_query: It seems that there are more than two ways of coming from god. Because we say god knows and wills, and also that he has the power to do things. So if there are two ways of coming, one from knowing and one from willing, it looks like there must be a third way from his power.
ugf_response: Power is what lets a thing do things to other things. So when god does things outside of himself, that shows his power. But this power does not mean another part of god comes from him; instead, it is shown by the things he makes coming from him.

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package does not arrive today. Therefore, the package arrives tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that one of two things must be true. Either the box gets here on this day, or it gets here on the next day. We know for sure that one of these two things has to happen. Then we look at the second idea. It tells us that the box does not get here on this day. This part is not happening. So we have a choice between two doors. One door is closed. That is the door for today. Since the first idea said one of the two doors must be open, and the door for today is shut, the other door must be open. The other door is for tomorrow. There is no other way for this to work. If the first idea is true and the second idea is true, then the box must come tomorrow. I can think of no story where the box does not come today, one of the two days must happen, and yet it still does not come tomorrow. That would break the first idea. So the last idea has to be true. follows

english_query: Will you count them out?
ugf_response: Getting money, fixing the body, and being right.

So if the higher ones know by more wide kinds than the lower ones, then the higher have a less perfect what is known than the lower and that is not right.

Knowing a thing that way is less perfect it is like only knowing a man as an animal. Second, looking at the way we do the knowing. In this way it is more perfect to know a thing in a wide way because the mind that can use one wide way to know each thing inside it is more perfect than a mind that cannot.

english_query: Also, words for body things are used for god only as a picture; since he has no body. But all such words point to some body state; for their meaning is tied to time and parts and like body states. So all these words are used for god only as a picture.
ugf_response: These words used for god in a real way point to body states not in what is meant, but in how we mean it; while those used for god as a picture point to and mean a body state in what is meant.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response: First, we look at a group of people who are all doing things at the same time. Second, we see that one person makes a change in what they are doing. Third, we see that this change makes the other people change what they are doing too. The step after the third step shows that the change from the first person moves through the group like a wave in water. The step after that shows that the way one person acts can change the way the whole group acts. The step after that shows that this is a way to tell how things move from one person to another in a group. Finally, we see that the choice made by the first person is the start of a new way for everyone to act.

english_query:
The payoff matrix (profits per interaction) is:

|               | Opponent Aggressive | Opponent Cooperative |
|---------------|---------------------|----------------------|
| **Aggressive**| (1, 1)              | (3, 0)               |
| **Cooperative**| (0, 3)              | (2, 2)               |

Let p be the proportion of Aggressive traders in the population. The expected fitness of each strategy is:

- f_A(p) = p·1 + (1‑p)·3 = 3 – 2p
- f_C(p) = p·0 + (1‑p)·2 = 2 – 2p

Average fitness: F(p) = p·f_A(p) + (1‑p)·f_C(p).

The replicator equation for the Aggressive strategy is:

dx/dt = p ( f_A(p) – F(p) ).

When p > 0.5, f_C > f_A, so p decreases; when p < 0.5, f_A > f_C, so p increases. The mixed equilibrium is at p* = 0.5, where both strategies earn the same fitness (f_A = f_C = 2). The player must show how a small perturbation (e.g., p = 0.55) leads the system back toward p = 0.5.
ugf_response: First, we look at the start point where half the group acts hard and half acts soft. At this spot, both ways get the same good points, so the group stays the same. Next, we change the group so a bit more than half act hard. We call this part thing number one. We check the points for each way. The hard way gets points by taking 3 and taking away 2 times thing number one. The soft way gets points by taking 2 and taking away 2 times thing number one. If thing number one is 0.55, the hard way gets 1.9 points and the soft way gets 0.9 points. The hard way gets more points. People want more points, so they do what the hard way does. This makes thing number one get bigger. It moves away from the middle spot of 0.5. It does not go back to the middle. The middle spot is not safe. If we push the group a little bit to have more hard doers, the hard doers do better and take over more. The group moves away from the middle, not back to it.

english_query: Either the suspect was at home or the suspect was at work. The suspect was at home. Therefore, the suspect was not at work. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, the first idea says the person was in one of two places: at home or at work. This kind of talk usually means they were in one place but not both. Second, the next idea tells us the person was at home. Third, if the person was at home and could only be in one of those two spots, then they could not be at work at the same time. So, the last idea that the person was not at work follows for sure from the first two ideas. follows

english_query: the idea that we are all connected and need each other
ugf_response:
Think about a large group of small things that work together to make one big thing. A forest is a good way to see this. The trees do not live all by themselves. They need the ground to hold them. They need the sun to give them light. They need the rain to give them water. They also need the tiny things in the ground to help them eat. If you take away the water, the trees die. If you take away the tiny things in the ground, the trees die. Everything is tied to everything else in a way that we can see.

People are like those things in the forest. We are not alone. We are tied to each other in many ways. Think about the food you eat. You did not make that food yourself. Someone else grew it. Someone else moved it to the place where you live. Someone else sold it to you. You need that person to live. That person needs you to keep the system going.

Think about the clothes you wear. Someone else made those clothes. Someone else made the machines that made the clothes. We all do things for other people, and other people do things for us. This means we are all part of one big group of things that touch each other. If one part of this group breaks, it can hurt the other parts.

When we say we need each other, it means that no person can do everything alone. We have things we are good at, and we have things we are bad at. One person might be good at building houses. Another person might be good at growing food. Another person might be good at making things that help people when they are sick. Because we are all different, we must work together to make sure everyone stays well and happy.

If we act in a way that hurts someone else, we are really hurting the group of things that we all live on. If the group is broken, it is harder for everyone to live. But if we take care of each other, the whole group becomes strong. We are all tied together, and what we do to one part of the group matters to every other part.

english_query: Are his words right and does the talk say we are wrong when we look for bad idea before we find what one knows; that must be found first then the way of bad idea?
ugf_response: I can only say the same as you, the old teacher, up to now we have come.

english_query: Either the runner finished first or the runner finished second. The runner did not finish first. Therefore, the runner finished second. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea which says the runner did one of two things: finish first or finish second. Then, the second idea tells us the runner did not do the first thing. Since the runner must have done one of the two things and did not do the first one, it must be true that the runner did the second one. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: If the book is on the shelf, then she can borrow the book. The book is not on the shelf. Therefore, she cannot borrow the book. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the book is on the high place for books, then she can take the book to read. This sets up a clear path. If the book is there, taking it is possible. But this idea does not say what happens if the book is not there. It only talks about the case where the book is on the high place. Then we look at the second idea. It tells us the book is not on the high place. This means the first part of the if-then thought is not true. Now we must ask if the last idea follows. The last idea says she cannot take the book to read. But the first idea did not say that being on the high place is the only way to take the book. Maybe she can take it from a friend, or from a box on the floor. The first idea allows for other ways to take the book. So, just because the book is not on the high place, we do not know for sure that she cannot take it. She might still be able to take it in another way. So the last idea does not follow for sure from the early ideas. does not follow

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response:
Imagine a group of people living together in a place. To live well, they must decide how to act toward one another. They need to make a set of ways to act that everyone will follow. One way to make these ways is to say that we should only do things that every person could say yes to if they were thinking clearly and being even. This means that if we make a way for people to act, we must ask if any person, in any place, could say yes to it.

The hard question is this. How do we know which ways of acting are good enough for everyone? If we want to make a way for all people to follow, we cannot just pick what one group wants. We must find a way that stays the same for every person, no matter who they are or where they live. We must ask if a way of acting would be okay for a person who has nothing, or for a person who has everything.

Some people say we must look at what happens after we act. They think a way of acting is good if it makes the most feeling of good for the most people. They say that if a way of acting makes many people feel good and only a few people feel bad, then it is a good way. They think this is the best way to make life good for the whole group.

Other people say that is not enough. They say that some things are always wrong, even if they make many people feel good. They think that we must follow ways of acting that hold every single person in high thought. They say that we cannot use one person to make others feel good. To them, a way of acting is only good if it acts toward every person as a person who can choose for themselves. They think we should only follow ways that we would want everyone else to follow too.

english_query: Also, if the Son is made by the Father, either he is always being made, or there is a time when he is made. If he is always being made, then because making means not being done yet, he would always be not done, which is wrong. So there must be a time when he was made, and before that time he was not there.
ugf_response: In time, there is a single point that cannot be cut, and there is time that goes on. But in the forever time, the single point stays still. The making of the Son is not in the time that goes on, but in the forever time. So to show this forever staying, we can say he is always being made, as one old teacher said. But as other old teachers said, it is better to say he is always made, so that always shows the forever staying, and made shows he is all done. So he is not not done, and there was no time when he was not there.

english_query: It looks like perfect means having no gone parts. But the human body does not have as many parts as the bodies of other animals, because those animals have skin and own parts that keep them safe, which a person does not have. So the human body is not set up well.
ugf_response: Hard points and hard ends, which some animals use to stay safe, and thick skin and lots of hair or soft hairs, which animals wear as cover, show that those animals have a lot of earth stuff; that does not fit the even and soft feel of a person. So those things are not a good fit for a person. Instead, a person has thinking and hands that can make things that help do work and clothes and other things needed for life in many kinds. That is why people say the hand is the part of parts. This fits better with the thinking kind of a person, which can think of many things and make many things.

english_query: If the bridge is open, then traffic can cross the river. Traffic cannot cross the river. Therefore, the bridge is closed. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the bridge is open, then cars can go over the river. This is a plan about what happens when the bridge is in one state. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that cars cannot go over the river right now. We need to see if this means the bridge must be shut. Let us think about the plan again. The plan only tells us what happens if the bridge is open. It does not say what happens if the bridge is not open. Maybe the bridge is open but broken. Maybe the bridge is open but there is a stop for cars. In those cases, the bridge is not shut, but cars still cannot cross. So, just because cars cannot cross, we cannot be sure the bridge is shut. It could be open but blocked. So this means the last idea does not follow for sure from the first two ideas. does not follow

english_query: If the candidate wins the vote, then the candidate takes office. The candidate loses the vote. Therefore, the candidate does not take office. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the person wins the pick, then that person gets the job. This is an if-then thing. The first part is winning. The second part is getting the job. Next, we look at the second idea. It says the person loses the pick. Losing is not winning. So we know the first part of the if-then thing did not happen. Now we must check the last idea. It says the person does not get the job. Does this have to be true? Not for sure. The first idea only tells us what happens when the person wins. It does not say what happens when the person loses. Maybe the person can get the job for another reason, even if they lose the pick. The first idea does not stop that from happening. So, we can imagine a story where the person loses the pick but still gets the job because of a special way. In that story, the first two ideas are true, but the last idea is not true. Since we can imagine this, the last idea does not follow for sure from the first two. does not follow

english_query: We will know better, my good friend, in a little while. The point which I should first wish to understand is whether the good way is loved by the gods because it is the good way, or the good way because it is loved by the gods.
ugf_response: I do not understand your meaning, old teacher.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response: First, you let the person talk and you try to hear every word they say. When they speak, pay close attention to the way they say things, the tone of their voice, and the pauses they take. Those small signs can tell you that something more is being kept back. Second, after you have listened, you ask nice questions. Use words like “why”, “how”, “what happened next”, and “who else was there”. These questions help the person think about parts of their story that may not have been spoken at first. When you ask, do not push too hard; instead, let the person feel safe enough to share more. Third, watch what the person does as they speak. Notice if their eyes look away, if they touch their face, or if they move their weight. These small things they do often point to parts of the story that are still hidden. When you see a sign like that, you can say something like “I see you seem not calm about that part, would you like to talk about it?” This lets the person know you have noticed and that you are ready to hear more. Next, look at the facts that are already known. Write down the things that have been said and the things that have been seen. Then ask yourself what is not there. If a person says they were at a place at a certain time, check if there is any other person or any other thing that could have been there at the same time. If a part of the story does not fit the very same fact you already have, that not the same part is a sign that something is still hidden. After that, talk to other people who know the same person. Ask them in a kind way what they saw or heard. Different people may have seen different pieces of the same story. When you bring those pieces together, the hidden parts become clearer. Then, think about the whole picture made of pieces. Put the spoken words, the small signs, the facts, and the pieces from the people together like a picture made of pieces. See where there are empty parts. Those empty parts are the places where the hidden parts may still be. Try to fill each empty part by asking another nice question or by looking for another sign. Finally, be calm and keep a tone that does not change fast. Sometimes hidden parts do not come out right away. Giving the person time and showing that you are not thinking about right or wrong helps them feel safe enough to let those parts rise. In the end, the way to find the hidden parts of the story of a person is to listen well, ask nice questions, watch small signs, check the known facts, talk to other people, and put all the pieces together while staying calm and not changing fast. By doing this you give the person a chance to share the whole story, not just the parts that are easy to say.

english_query: If the cat is in the kitchen, then the cat can hear the can opener. If the cat can hear the can opener, then driving is dangerous. Therefore, if the cat is in the kitchen, then driving is dangerous. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the cat is in the kitchen, then the cat can hear the open sound. Next, we look at the second idea. It says if the cat can hear the open sound, then driving is bad. We want to know if the last idea follows. The last idea says if the cat is in the kitchen, then driving is bad. Let us check this. Imagine the cat is in the kitchen. From the first idea, we know the cat can hear the open sound. Now that we know the cat can hear the open sound, we use the second idea. It tells us driving is bad. So, if the cat is in the kitchen, driving is bad. This way of thinking works. There is no way for the first two ideas to be true and the last one to be wrong. If the cat is in the kitchen, the sound happens, and the bad driving follows. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: Then, as we both agree that a person should ask about what he does not know, should you and I try to ask together about what being good is?
ugf_response: By all means, the old teacher. And yet I would rather go back to my first question, whether when we try to get being good we should think it is something that can be taught, or a gift from the way things are, or something that comes to people in another way?

english_query: Pairwise majority voting creates a cycle: M beats B (2‑1), B beats C (2‑1), and C beats M (2‑1). Each itinerary wins against one opponent and loses to another, so the group preference is intransitive even though every individual ranking is transitive. The agenda‑setter (who chooses the voting order) effectively decides the winner.
ugf_response: First, we see that when we look at side by side two things at a time, the first thing is better than the second thing by two to one, the second thing is better than the third thing by two to one, and the third thing is better than the first thing by two to one. Then, we notice that each thing is better one time and is not better another time, so the people do not have a single line of who is most. Because the person who picks which two are looked at side by side first can make the first thing end up on top, or can make the second thing end up on top, or can make the third thing end up on top, that person can decide which thing ends up on top. Some might say that the people choices should not count on the order, and that a just law should give the same thing on top no matter how the pairs are asked. Even so, without a law that stops the back and forward, the power to pick the order gives a lot of power to the person who picks, and that is what matters most. The best answer is that the person who picks the order can make a pick of the thing that ends up on top, so the way is not just unless we make different how we ask the questions.

english_query: Also, to talk is to turn a thought in the mind toward someone else, as was shown before. But a spirit from god always turns his thought to god. So if a spirit from god talks to god, he always talks to god; which seems not right in some ways, because a spirit from god sometimes talks to another spirit from god. So it seems a spirit from god never talks to god.
ugf_response: Spirits from god are always talking to god in the way of saying good things about him and his work; but they talk to him by asking him what should be done at any time they have to do any new work, about which they want to know more.

english_query: Also, we should only say of god what is backed by the god books, as the old teacher said. But the god books never say that the father, son, and spirit are of one what-they-really-are. So we should not say this.
ugf_response: Even if we do not see these clear words in the god books saying the three are of one what-they-really-are, we do see the same meaning there; like when it says 'I and the father are one,' and 'I am in the father, and the father in me'; and there are many other parts of the book that mean the same thing.

english_query: Either the suspect was at home or the suspect was at work. The suspect was not at home. Therefore, the suspect was at work. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must be true. The first thing is that the person was at home. The second thing is that the person was at work. The word either means we must pick one of these choices. We cannot pick no choice at all. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the person was not at home. This takes away the first choice. Since we must pick one of the two choices, and the first one is gone, only the second choice is left. The second choice is that the person was at work. So, if the first idea is true and the second idea is true, then the last idea must be true. We can imagine a story to check this. Imagine a man we call the first guy. The first idea says the first guy is either home or at work. We find out the first guy is not home. In this story, the first guy must be at work. There is no other place for him to be using the words given. So the last idea follows for sure from the earlier ones. follows

So in the good spirits the power of knowing is not a different kind from that in human reason, but is like the full thing to the not full thing.

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package arrives today. Therefore, the package does not arrive tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says one of two things must be true. The first thing is that the box comes here today. The second thing is that the box comes here tomorrow. The word 'either' and 'or' usually means you pick one. But in many cases, 'or' lets both happen at the same time unless we say 'only one'. Here, it just says one or the other is true. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us the box comes here today. This is the same as the first part of the first idea. Now we ask if the box can also come tomorrow. The first idea does not say the box cannot come tomorrow. It just says at least one of those days will see the box. Imagine a story where the box comes today and also comes tomorrow. In this story, the first idea is true because the box came today. The second idea is also true because the box came today. But in this story, the last idea is wrong because the box did come tomorrow. Since we can imagine a story where the early ideas are true but the last idea is wrong, the last idea does not have to be true. It might be true, but it does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: the question of what we owe to people we will never meet
ugf_response: First, we think about the people who live now and the people who will live after we are gone. Second, we ask if we must care for people we do not know and will never see. Third, we look at how the things we do today can change the world for those who come later. We might make things better for them, or we might make things much worse. The thing after the third thing, we consider if a person is still a person even if they are not here right now. If they are a person, then they have needs and they can feel pain or good feelings. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we look at the way we give things to others. We might give money, or we might take care of the earth so it stays good. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third thing, we must think about what is right to do. If we only care about people we see, we might use up everything and leave nothing for those who come after. This would be a bad thing to do. The thing after the thing after the thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that we are part of a long line of people. We are here because people before us lived and worked. Because of this, we should act in a way that keeps the world good for the people who will come after us, even if we will never meet them.

english_query: If the alarm rang, then she woke up. The alarm rang. Therefore, she woke up. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the loud noise from the waking machine happened, then the person opened her eyes and stopped sleeping. This is an if-then idea. The first part is the waking machine making noise. The second part is her waking up. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the waking machine did make noise. This fits the first part of the if-then idea. When the first part of an if-then idea is true, the second part must also be true. So, since the waking machine made noise, she must have woken up. There is no way for the first two ideas to be true and the last idea to be wrong. If the waking machine made noise, she woke up. The waking machine made noise. So she woke up. This means the last idea follows for sure from the earlier ideas. follows

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package arrives today. Therefore, the package does not arrive tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

But the first line does not say that the two ways can not both happen. So we can not be sure that the thing also comes tomorrow. The last line does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: Also, no bad thing is good: 'Bad things happen to you who call bad things good and good things bad'. But some things are called bad. So not every thing that is, is good.
ugf_response: No thing that is, is called bad because it is a thing, but only because it is missing some part of being. So a man is called bad because he is missing some good way of acting; and an eye is called bad because it is missing the power to see well.

english_query: why following rules is not enough if you do not care about people
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must follow a set of ways to act. These ways are written down so that everyone knows what to do. This person follows every way in the same way every time. They do not break any of the ways. They do the things that the book says they must do. To an outside eye, this person looks good. They look like a good person because they do not do anything that is not allowed.

But there is a problem. This person does not care about the people around them. They only care about the written ways. They follow the ways because they want to be right, not because they want to help. If a way says to do one thing, but doing that thing will make a person feel very bad or cause them great pain, the person will still do it. They do it because the book said so. They do not stop to think about the hurt they are making.

The hard question is this. Is it enough to just do what is allowed? If you follow every way but you have no love or care for other people, are you actually a good person?

Some people will say yes. They will say that the ways are there to keep things from becoming a state of great trouble. They will say that if everyone just follows the ways, the world will work well. To these people, the ways are the most important thing. They think that if we stop following the ways, everything will fall into pieces. They think that even if a person is cold or does not care, it is better than having no ways at all.

Other people will say no. They will say that the whole point of the ways is to help people live together in a good way. They will say that if you follow the ways but you do not care about people, you have missed the point. They think that a person who follows the ways but hurts others is not a good person at all. To them, caring for others is the most important thing, even more than the ways themselves. They think that a person must use their heart to know if what they are doing is good in the real sense.

english_query: how we build a picture of the world from small pieces of what we see
ugf_response:
The first idea is that we do not see the whole world all at once. Instead, we see only small parts of it. We see small bits of light and small bits of sound. The second idea is that our mind takes these small bits and puts them together. It makes a big picture from all those small bits. The third idea is that this big picture is how we know what the world is like.

The thing that follows from these ideas is that what we think is true about the world is just a way our mind puts things together. If the small bits we see are not right, then the big picture our mind makes will not be right. This means we can never be sure that what we see is the very same thing that is actually there. We only know the picture our mind has made.

To see if this way of thinking is good, we must look at how the mind works. One way to think about it is that the mind must make a guess to fill in the empty spaces between the small bits. If the mind makes a good guess, the big picture will be close to what is real. But if the mind makes a bad guess, the picture will be wrong. The thinking is good if we can find ways to see if our big picture is the same as the small bits. If we cannot see if they are the same, then we may be living in a world that is not real.
